problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation — specifically Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
